author: Linus Torvalds
text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.

author: Donald Knuth
text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

author: Ken Thompson
text: One of my most productive days was throwing away 1000 lines of code.

author: Grace Hopper
text: The most dangerous phrase is: 'We've always done it this way.'

author: Edsger W. Dijkstra
text: Simplicity is a prerequisite for reliability.

author: Steve Jobs
text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.

author: Albert Einstein
text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.

author: Robert C. Martin
text: Clean code always looks like it was written by someone who cares.

author: Brian Kernighan
text: Debugging is twice as hard as writing the code in the first place.

author: Kent Beck
text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.

author: Martin Fowler
text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.

author: Bjarne Stroustrup
text: Make simple tasks simple.

author: Linus Torvalds
text: Bad programmers worry about the code. Good programmers worry about data structures.

author: Paul Graham
text: Always leave things better than you found them.

author: Dennis Ritchie
text: C is quirky, flawed, and an enormous success.

author: Bill Gates
text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.

author: Steve McConnell
text: Good code is its own best documentation.

author: Andrew Hunt
text: Don't live with broken windows.

author: David Thomas
text: Good enough software is often better than perfect software.

author: Yukihiro Matsumoto
text: Programming is like writing a book... except if you miss out a single comma on page 126 the whole thing makes no sense.

author: Guido van Rossum
text: Code is read much more often than it is written.

author: John Carmack
text: Focused, hard work is the real key to success.

author: Linus Torvalds
text: Most good programmers do programming not because they expect to get paid, but because it is fun.

author: Donald Knuth
text: The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.

author: Edsger W. Dijkstra
text: Testing shows the presence, not the absence of bugs.

author: Grace Hopper
text: A ship in port is safe, but that is not what ships are built for.

author: Ken Thompson
text: You can’t trust code that you did not totally create yourself.

author: Robert C. Martin
text: The only way to go fast, is to go well.

author: Brian Kernighan
text: Controlling complexity is the essence of computer programming.

author: Martin Fowler
text: Any code is easier to change than no code at all.

author: Kent Beck
text: I’m not a great programmer; I’m just a good programmer with great habits.

author: Bjarne Stroustrup
text: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.

author: Bill Gates
text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.

author: Steve Jobs
text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.

author: Linus Torvalds
text: Software is like sex: it's better when it's free.

author: Donald Knuth
text: Science is what we understand well enough to explain to a computer. Art is everything else we do.
